summary: DynamicDescription type defined but unused — dead code at tool.ts:15
detail: export type DynamicDescription = (agent: Agent.Info) => Effect.Effect<string> exists at tool.ts:15 but grep shows 0 usages across the entire codebase. The Tool.Def interface uses description: string, not string | DynamicDescription. This type is the SDK-level hook for the Phase 1 work. Recommended future slice: wire DynamicDescription into Tool.Def and fromPlugin().

summary: tools() callback uses hardcoded special cases for TaskTool/SkillTool — no extensibility
detail: The Effect.forEach callback in tools() has two ternary expressions checking tool.id === TaskTool.id and tool.id === SkillTool.id to decide whether to append describeTask/describeSkill output. No other tools can provide agent-specific description content. This plan generalizes these into a single describeTool() function. Recommended future slice: remove the describeTask/describeSkill special cases entirely once DynamicDescription is wired.

summary: fromPlugin() discards all module-level exports except the tool definition
detail: During dynamic import of .opencode/tools/*.ts, Object.entries(mod) iterates module exports and only processes values passing isPluginTool(). Module-level exports like SPAWN_RULES (smart_delegate.ts:25) or the proposed modeDescriptions are visible at import time but not captured into any persistent structure. This plan adds explicit capture of modeDescriptions into State. Recommended future slice: generalize module metadata capture for all .opencode tool exports.
